jigeum

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Fromm - Let me fall

Romanization

Let it fall, let it fall
Like the rain, softly falling.
Let it fall, let it fall
Like a dream, drifting featherly

Don’t fear, my dear
I’m gonna close my eyes, be with me
Hey I love you, thinking of you through the dark.

Baby, let me hold you, don’t need any spark.
And when your day becomes the night
I’ll sing you lullabies, easy for me

Let me fall, Let me fall
Like the tide, ebbing gently
Let me fall, Let me fall
Like the stars, shining endlessly

Delight in tonight
Stars don’t fear the dark, be with me.

Hey I love you, thinking of you through the dark.
Baby, let me hold you, don’t need any spark.
And when your day becomes the night
I’ll sing you lullabies, easy for me

Don't you, baby…feel the way you're fading, too?
You can tell me, anytime you’re lost and blue

Oh I love you, thinking of you through the dark.
Baby, let me hold you, don’t need any spark.
You’ll see, when day becomes the night.
I'll sing your name, so stay

Hey I love you, thinking of you through the dark.
Baby, let me hold you, don’t need any spark.
And when your day becomes the night
I’ll sing you lullabies, easy for me

Don't you, baby
feel the way you're fading, too?

Hangeul

Let it fall, let it fall
Like the rain, softly falling.
Let it fall, let it fall

Don’t fear, my dear
I’m gonna close my eyes, be with me

Don't you, baby…feel the way you're fading, too?

Oh I love you, thinking of you through the dark.
Baby, let me hold you, don’t need any spark.
You’ll see, when day becomes the night.
I'll sing your name, so stay

Hey I love you, thinking of you through the dark.
Baby, let me hold you, don’t need any spark.
And when your day becomes the night
I’ll sing you lullabies, easy for me

Don't you, baby
feel the way you're fading, too?

ulgo sipeul ttae ulji mothaeseorago

urin sarangeul deo saranghaeya haetji

옅은 꽃향기에 취한 잠
그리워한 마음
노란색 이불 위로
서로 꿈을 이어 꾸던 그날의 너와 나

Let this pass you by oh

isi.lyrics:
Lyric YUQI (i-dle) - 还痛吗

Romanization

还痛吗
回忆太锋利总不听话 咽不下
是雨吗 泪吗 算了吧

还痛吗
熟悉旋律被放大
只剩我独自舔舐伤疤 还痛吗
我们本该同样挣扎 本该 这样

就算我从此消失从此故事没有以后
就算我们的相拥没有理由
痛也愿意停留 再多痛 会愈合
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

这一次 我们会在 十字路口 擦肩而过
下一段旅途 你向左 我向右
我 会永远记得 你眼中 的炙热
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

当天空都被冷冻在那一句
当刺痛快浇透了勇气
现在才看懂 你那些沉默不语
声嘶力竭 原来这是我们的完结

I can’t hear what you’re saying
身体只剩痛觉
随你离开停滞在那天
You’re breaking my heart
(I don’t know why you did this to me)

就算我从此消失从此故事没有以后
就算我们的相拥没有理由
痛也愿意停留 再多痛 会愈合
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

这一次 我们会在 十字路口 擦肩而过
下一段旅途 你向左 我向右
我 会永远记得 你眼中 的炙热
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

还在痛吗
还会痛吗
还要痛吗
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

I’m falling apart
My love is gone
I’m breaking down
祝愿在时空的转弯
我们和幸福遇见

Hangeul

还痛吗
回忆太锋利总不听话 咽不下
是雨吗 泪吗 算了吧

还痛吗
熟悉旋律被放大

apeuda

ttodasi chajaoneun achime naega eopseodo

uri eodiseo eonjedeun haengbokhagireul barae

Hangeul

아프다
날카로운 기억 속에 혼자 차갑다
눈물아 흘러 빗방울

아프다
즐겨 듣던 노래가 쏟아졌고
또다시 나만 아프다
내가 너보다 못되게 할걸 그땐

또다시 찾아오는 아침에 내가 없어도
안기며 웃던 날 기억 못 해도
아프긴 하지만 괜찮아 너니까
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

더 깊어져 가는 밤안개 속 그 길 위에서
혹시 우리가 서로를 잃어도
날 사랑했던 널 찾아갈 테니까
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

너가 먼저 날 떠나버렸지
그만하자 아무 표정 없이
이제 알았어 그때 왜 그랬는지
반쯤 미쳐 너의 이름을 불렀는데

I can’t hear what you’re saying
돌아와 줘 내게 너도 미쳐있었던 내게
You’re breaking my heart
(I don’t know why you did this to me)

또다시 찾아오는 아침에 내가 없어도
안기며 웃던 날 기억 못 해도

You know I’ll always be with you, baby

더 깊어져 가는 밤안개 속 그 길 위에서
혹시 우리가 서로를 또 잃어도
날 사랑했던 널 찾아갈 테니까
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

난 아프다
참 아프다
또 아프다
You know I’ll always be with you, baby

I’m falling apart
My love is gone
I’m breaking down
